abort-no-message: abort does not accept a message
assistant-content-not-array: Assistant message content must be an array
assistant-text-missing: Assistant text content must contain text
consult-timeout: Orchestrator unavailable; proceed with your best judgment and flag the assumption.
control-socket-too-long: Control socket path is too long: $path
expected-one-jsonl: Expected one Pi JSONL for session '$id', found $count
failed-response-no-error: Failed $context response must contain an error
field-empty: Prompt field '$field' must not be empty
field-must-be-one-of: Prompt field '$field' must be one of: $values
handback-dirty:
Your worktree has uncommitted changes:

$status

Commit what belongs in your deliverable, and delete or gitignore the rest, then hand back with a clean tree.
handback-rebase-warning:
WARNING: the session handed back with a rebase in progress — pi left the conflict resolution to you.

Conflicted files:
$conflicts

Resolve them in $worktree (or resume the session with instructions), run 'git rebase --continue', re-verify, then merge.
handback-warning:
WARNING: the session did not hand back cleanly. Resolve in $worktree or resume the session.

$problem
help-builtins: Built-ins: help, sessions, result, steer, queue, interrupt, merge, discard, watch
help-usage:
Usage: pi-run <command> [args...] (run from inside the project)

Prompt commands:
inject-must-be-map: Prompt field 'inject' must be a nested map
invalid-prompt-lifecycle: Invalid prompt lifecycle: sandbox=$sandbox, worktree=$worktree, session=$session
main-moved-after-rebase: Main moved after rebase; run merge again to rebase onto its new HEAD
main-not-on-branch: The main checkout must be on a branch
merged: Merged '$id' into $branch and removed its worktree and branch.
model-label-invalid-thinking: Model label '$label' has an invalid thinking level
model-label-no-provider: Model label '$label' must contain a provider/model id
model-label-non-string-thinking: Model label '$label' has a non-string thinking level
no-thinking-level: No thinking level configured for model '$label'
output-append-must-use-block: Prompt field 'output-append' must use a | block
pi-model-error-no-message: Pi reported a model error without a message
pi-settled-without-result: Pi settled without an assistant result
plan-name-not-portable: Plan name '$name' must be a portable session id using lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
question-from-session:
$text

Consult question from session '$id'. Answer by writing $path
read-denied: Read denied: '$path' is under restricted path '$entry'
rebase-stopped-with-conflicts:
Rebase stopped with conflicts in:
$conflicts
Worktree: $worktree
Resolve the files there yourself, or delegate with `pi-run resume $id "<instructions>"`. Then stage them, run `git rebase --continue`, re-verify, and run merge again.
rebased-onto-updated: Rebased '$id' onto updated $branch. Re-run verification in $worktree, then run merge again.
rpc-event-type-not-string: RPC event type must be a string
rpc-response-id-not-string: RPC response id must be a string
sandbox-field-not-string-array: Sandbox field '$field' must be an array of non-empty strings
sandbox-init-failed-blocked: Sandbox initialization failed; bash is blocked
sandbox-init-failed-notify: Sandbox initialization failed; bash is blocked: $error
sandbox-mode-invalid: PI_RUN_SANDBOX_MODE must be worktree-write or read-only
sandbox-not-initialized-blocked: Sandbox has not initialized; bash is blocked
sandbox-unavailable-blocked: Sandbox is unavailable; bash is blocked
sandboxed-command-timeout: Sandboxed command timed out after $seconds seconds
session-already-exists: Session '$id' already exists; resume it or choose a new plan name
session-currently-running: Session '$id' is currently running; steer it, interrupt it, or wait for it to settle
session-ended: Session '$id' has ended; its worktree and consult channel are gone.
session-name-burned: A previous session already used the name '$id' and its conversation log is kept; choose a new plan name
session-no-changes-to-merge: Session '$id' has no changes to merge
session-rebase-in-progress: Session '$id' has a rebase in progress; resolve the conflicts and run 'git rebase --continue' first
session-uncommitted-changes: Session '$id' has uncommitted changes; resume the session to commit them, or commit or clean up in $worktree
unterminated-quote: Prompt field '$field' has an unterminated quote
write-denied-outside-allowed: Write denied: '$path' is outside allowed paths
write-denied-read-only: Write denied: '$path' because this command is read-only
